2604.18347.title: Multilingual Training and Evaluation Resources for Vision-Language Models
2604.18347.paper_summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) achieved rapid progress in the recent years. However, despite their growth, VLMs development is heavily grounded on English, leading to two main limitations: (i) the lack of multilingual and multimodal datasets for training, and (ii) the scarcity of comprehensive evaluation benchmarks across languages. In this work, we address these gaps by introducing a new comprehensive suite of resources for VLMs training and evaluation spanning five European languages (English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish). We adopt a regeneration-translation paradigm that produces high-quality cross-lingual resources by combining curated synthetic generation and manual annotation. Specifically, we build Multi-PixMo, a training corpus obtained regenerating examples from Pixmo pre-existing datasets with permissively licensed models: PixMo-Cap, PixMo-AskModelAnything, and CoSyn-400k. On the evaluation side, we construct a set of multilingual benchmarks derived translating widely used English datasets (MMbench, ScienceQA, MME, POPE, AI2D). We assess the quality of these resources through qualitative and quantitative human analyses, measuring inter-annotator agreement. Additionally, we perform ablation studies to demonstrate the impact of multilingual data, with respect to English only, in VLMs training. Experiments, comprising 3 different models show that using multilingual, multimodal examples for training VLMs aids is consistently beneficial on non-English benchmarks, with positive transfer to English as well.
2604.18347.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）在最近幾年取得了快速進展。<lb/>然而，儘管它們的增長，VLMs 的發展仍然主要基於英語，導致了兩個主要限制：（i）缺乏用於訓練的多語言和多模態數據集，以及（ii）跨語言的全面評估基準稀缺。在這項工作中，我們通過引入一套新的全面資源來解決這些空白，該資源涵蓋五種歐洲語言（英語、法語、德語、意大利語和西班牙語）以進行 VLMs 的訓練和評估。我們採用再生-翻譯範式，通過結合策劃的合成生成和手動註釋來產生高質量的跨語言資源。<lb/>具體而言，我們構建了 Multi-PixMo，一個訓練語料庫，該語料庫是通過使用許可模型從 Pixmo 預先存在的數據集中再生示例而獲得的：PixMo-Cap、PixMo-AskModelAnything 和 CoSyn-400k。在評估方面，我們構建了一組多語言基準，這些基準是通過翻譯廣泛使用的英語數據集（MMbench、ScienceQA、MME、POPE、AI2D）而得出的。我們通過定性和定量的人類分析來評估這些資源的質量，測量標註者之間的一致性。此外，我們進行了消融研究，以展示多語言數據對 VLMs 訓練的影響，相較於僅使用英語的情況。<lb/>實驗包括 3 種不同的模型，顯示使用多語言、多模態示例來訓練 VLMs 在非英語基準上始終有益，並且對英語也有正向轉移。
2604.18347.author: Daniela Baiamonte et.al.
2604.18347.authors: Daniela Baiamonte, Elena Fano, Matteo Gabburo, Stefano Simonazzi, Leonardo Rigutini, Andrea Zugarini
